description_long: This object is a small, cylindrical bottled water container with a slightly tapered body and a detachable cap. The bottle is primarily white with blue accents, including a blue rim at the top and bottom, and a blue cap that appears ribbed for grip. There are blue markings or text on the side of the bottle, possibly indicating branding or labeling, with stylized characters visible from certain angles. The bottle is made of a translucent material, likely plastic, allowing some visibility of the interior. The cap is positioned above the bottle, suggesting it is removable and designed to seal the opening securely.
description: A small, white and blue cylindrical bottled water container with a ribbed blue cap and blue markings on the side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle with a blue cap above it and partial blue text or branding visible on the white body.
description_view_1: Rotated view reveals more of the blue text or symbols, with the cap still above and the bottle's tapering shape clear.
description_view_2: Side view displays the bottle's smooth, mostly unmarked surface with only a hint of the blue text visible.
description_view_3: Rear view shows the plain white surface of the bottle with minimal visible markings and the cap above.
attribute_label_or_branding: Blue stylized text or symbols are present on the side of the bottle, occupying a vertical section and rendered in a bold, clear font. The text appears to be part of the branding, but only partial characters are visible from the provided views.
attribute_cap_type: Screw cap; short, cylindrical, ribbed for grip, and colored blue. The cap is shown detached above the bottle.
attribute_transparency: The bottle is translucent, allowing some visibility of the interior but not fully transparent. The blue and white coloration slightly obscures the contents.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short neck with a slight flare at the top, featuring external threading for the screw cap. The neck is proportionally small compared to the body and has a blue rim.
